step_rationale: PAPP-A is a matrix metalloproteinase; marker of fibrous-cap degradation and plaque destabilization.
mechanism: PAPP-A is a metalloproteinase elevated in atherosclerotic plaques that degrades extracellular matrix, promoting cap rupture and thrombosis.
